'''Vance Rego''' was a member of the [[Cilpari Resistance]] in [[4 ABY/Legends|4 ABY]]. He was supposed to meet [[Winter Celchu|Winter]]—the [[New Republic case officer]] for [[Cilpar]]—and obtain aid in fighting the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperials]]. He was also working for the local Imperial [[Moff/Legends|Moff]], [[Boren Tascl]], as a double agent. He led Tascl's stormtroopers<ref name="TCSWE" /> to Winter's location, then later claimed to resistance leader [[Elscol Loro]] that he had barely escaped the trap himself.

Loro became increasingly suspicious of his activities—which included an obsession with recovering some [[Zero-G assault stormtrooper|spacetrooper]] armor—and before the [[Mission to Cilpar|assault]] on the Moff's base at [[Kiidan]] she confronted him. Although Rego drew a blaster on her, the intervention of [[Groznik]] saved her from being shot.

Cursing Loro the whole time Rego then tried to recover the spacetrooper armor, determined to use its firepower to aid the Moff's defense. The armor, however, was missing its helmet and had become the nesting place of a [[Ronk/Legends|ronk]], which left him nursing the stump of his forearm.
